article_title: 30 道 LINQ 面试题：2026 年真实会被问到的那些
core_theme: 30 道 LINQ 面试题覆盖延迟执行、IQueryable vs IEnumerable、表达式树、现代 .NET 9/10 运算符和 EF Core 实战，每道题都包含好回答和会挂的回答
reader_takeaway: 理解 LINQ 查询什么时候执行、在哪里执行（内存还是数据库），知道面试中什么回答会过关什么会挂
summary_angle: 从「知道 LINQ 语法」到「理解 LINQ 编译成什么」的面试进阶路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文引言：只链式调用直到结果对 vs 理解编译机制
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧散落的语法碎片（Where/Select/GroupBy），似懂非懂

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Execution Model」节：延迟执行通过 yield return 和表达式树实现
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央一个「执行引擎」或流程图：IEnumerable 懒惰迭代器 + IQueryable 表达式树变 SQL

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「IEnumerable vs IQueryable」节：6 个类别 30 道题覆盖从基础到性能
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧 6 个层级递进的模块或卡片：基础 → 执行模型 → IEn vs IQ → 运算符 → 性能 → EF Core
右下角一个对勾/通过的符号，暗示面试准备完备

main_metaphor: 面试阶梯/跑道：从左侧碎片化的语法知识，经过中间的执行模型理解，到达右侧 6 个类别 30 道题的完整准备
primary_subject: 一个递进的路径或阶梯结构，从碎片语法通向完整面试准备
subject_action: 路径从左侧碎片状态推进到右侧结构化的知识体系
composition: 居中主路径，左侧问题 → 中央机制 → 右侧结构化解决方案，水平递进
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: youthful campus romance illustration, clean school-life setting, soft backlight, subtle emotional gestures, fresh color palette
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#6）；用校园场景的「学习/备考」氛围呼应面试准备主题
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证左侧碎片/中间机制/右侧结构化的三段布局是否可读
revision_targets: 执行模型机制的视觉表达
6 类 30 题的层级清晰度
校园风格与编程主题的融合
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: 30 LINQ interview questions covering deferred execution, IEnumerable vs IQueryable, expression trees, modern .NET 9/10 operators, and EF Core scenarios. The reader should quickly feel the path from superficial syntax knowledge to deep understanding of how LINQ compiles and executes.

Summary angle: The interview preparation journey from only knowing LINQ syntax to understanding the compilation mechanism, execution model, and database translation.
Narrative flow: before-after. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem: Scattered LINQ syntax fragments on the left side (Where/Select/GroupBy pieces), labeled 「只知语法」
- Mechanism: Central execution engine or flow diagram showing IEnumerable lazy iterators and IQueryable expression trees transforming into SQL, labeled 「延迟执行」
- Contrast: Right side with 6 tiered modules/cards showing the interview categories progression: basics → execution → IEn vs IQ → operators → performance → EF Core, labeled 「6 类 30 题」 with number 30
- Takeaway: A checkmark/pass symbol at bottom right indicating complete interview readiness, labeled 「.NET 10」

Main metaphor: An interview preparation staircase/runway from fragmented syntax knowledge on the left through execution model understanding in the center to structured 6-category mastery on the right.
Subject: A progressive path or staircase structure from fragmented syntax toward structured interview readiness.
Composition: Central path, left problem → center mechanism → right structured solution, horizontal progression.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with youthful campus romance illustration, clean school-life setting, soft backlight, subtle emotional gestures, fresh color palette. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: soft sky blue, warm white, light coral, pale grass green.
Visible text policy: allow only 4 short Chinese labels or number chips sourced from the information blocks. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: code rain, fake terminals, fake dashboards, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, floating chips, neon skyscrapers.
